Features

Everything a reseller needs.
Nothing you don't.

Stop juggling spreadsheets, calculators, and five different apps. FlipTrack brings your entire reselling business into one place.

💰
See Your Real Profit
Know exactly what you make on every flip after platform fees, shipping costs, and sourcing expenses. No more guessing.
  • Automatic fee calculation for eBay, Poshmark, Mercari & more

AI Item Identification
Found something at the thrift store but don't know what it's worth? Snap a photo and let FlipTrack's AI tell you.
  • Instant brand, model, and category identification
  • Estimated resale value based on market data
  • One tap to add identified items to your inventory
  • Works right from your phone's camera

FAQ

Common questions

Is FlipTrack really free? ▾
Yes. The free tier gives you up to 50 active items with the full dashboard, profit tracking, AI identification, and CSV export. No credit card required, and it never expires. Upgrade to Pro or Unlimited only if you need more capacity or advanced features.
What platforms does FlipTrack support? ▾
FlipTrack supports eBay, Poshmark, Mercari, Depop, StockX, Vinted, OfferUp, Whatnot, TikTok Shop, Shopify, Etsy, and more. You can track sales and inventory across all of them from one dashboard.
How does the AI item identification work? ▾
Take a photo of any item and FlipTrack's AI will identify the brand, model, category, and estimated resale value. It works great for clothing, shoes, electronics, and collectibles. You can add identified items directly to your inventory with one tap.
Can I use FlipTrack on my phone? ▾
Absolutely. FlipTrack is a progressive web app (PWA) that works beautifully on any phone, tablet, or desktop. Add it to your home screen for an app-like experience — no app store download needed.
Does FlipTrack help with taxes? ▾
Yes. FlipTrack's Tax Center generates profit & loss reports, tracks deductible expenses, and organizes your data for tax season. Export everything as a CSV to hand to your accountant.
How is FlipTrack different from Vendoo or List Perfectly? ▾
Most reseller tools focus primarily on crosslisting. FlipTrack is a full business management dashboard — profit analytics, AI identification, expense tracking, tax reports, and sourcing logs. And the free tier is more generous than any competitor's paid plan.

Ready to know your real profit?

Join resellers who stopped guessing and started tracking. Free forever — no credit card, no commitment.
